prompt_text: Create a solid cube 100x100x100 mm, centered in X and Y, with the bottom face on Z=0.

Create one solid part. Units mm, right-handed XYZ, origin at center of bottom face, +Z up. Build a rectangular block with X=100, Y=100, Z=100. Keep it as one connected watertight solid with no extra features.
Create an open mug with an outer cylindrical body (diameter 120 mm, height 160 mm), 5 mm wall thickness and 5 mm base thickness, and add one side handle.

Create one connected mug. Units mm, +Z up. Outer body is a vertical cylinder with OD 120 and height 160. Hollow from z=5 to z=160 using inner diameter 110 so wall and base are 5. Add a side handle centered near mid-height, approximately spanning from near lower wall to upper wall, smoothly connected to the cup body. Keep top open and bottom closed.
Create two identical external spur gears in mesh: module 4, 40 teeth each, pressure angle 20 degrees, face width 20 mm, centers 160 mm apart on X.

Create exactly two disconnected solids representing identical external involute spur gears. Units mm. +Z is axis for both gears. Parameters per gear: module 4, teeth 40, pressure angle 20 deg, face width 20, no bore. Place centers at (0,0,0) and (160,0,0). Preserve valid meshing relation and output watertight solids.
Create a coaxial shaft assembly with a 20 mm diameter, 260 mm long shaft, two gears at z=-45 and z=45, and two bearings at z=-100 and z=100.

Create exactly five disconnected coaxial solids in mm: shaft plus gear_1, gear_2, bearing_1, bearing_2. Shaft: diameter 20, length 260 along Z. Gear_1 at z=-45 with OD 84 and width 16. Gear_2 at z=45 with OD 108 and width 20. Bearing_1 at z=-100 with OD 47 ID 20 width 14. Bearing_2 at z=100 with OD 47 ID 20 width 14. Keep all centers on Z-axis.
Create a stepped shaft with three coaxial sections: diameter 16 length 30, diameter 24 length 20, diameter 12 length 18, centered overall about Z.

Create one connected turned part in mm with +Z along axis. Section A: OD 16 from z=-34 to z=-4. Section B: OD 24 from z=-4 to z=16. Section C: OD 12 from z=16 to z=34. Keep transitions sharp and concentric. No holes, fillets, or extra cuts.
Create an L-bracket with a base plate 80x30x8 mm, an upright rib 8x30x50 mm on one side, two top holes of diameter 8, and one side hole of diameter 6.

Create one connected bracket in mm. Base block: 80x30x8 with bottom on z=0. Upright wall: 8x30x50 attached on the negative X side, starting at z=8. Add two through holes diameter 8 on the top face centered at x=-22 and x=22, y=0. Add one through hole diameter 6 on the negative X face near y=12 at mid-height. Keep sharp edges.
Create a round flange: outer diameter 70, thickness 12, center bore diameter 24, and four bolt holes diameter 6 on a square pattern at x,y = plus or minus 20.

Create one solid flange in mm. Main body: cylinder radius 35 height 12. Cut a through center hole diameter 24. Add four through holes diameter 6 at coordinates (20,20), (-20,20), (-20,-20), (20,-20) on the top face. Output one watertight component.
Create a ring spacer with outer diameter 52, inner diameter 32, and height 14.
Create one connected annular solid in mm: concentric outer radius 26, inner radius 16, extrusion height 14 along +Z with bottom at z=0. No chamfers or fillets.
Create a plate 120x60x10 mm with a centered through-slot of length 50 and width 14.
Create one plate in mm: 120 by 60 by 10 with base at z=0. Subtract a centered slot profile (slot2D) length 50 width 14 and cut fully through the thickness. Keep a single connected watertight solid.
Create a pillow-block style part: block 100x55x35 mm, one vertical through bore diameter 20 at center, and four mounting holes diameter 9 near the corners.

Create one connected housing in mm. Start from a 100x55x35 block with bottom on z=0. Add a central through hole diameter 20 normal to top face. Add four mounting through holes diameter 9 from bottom face at points (-35,-18), (35,-18), (-35,18), (35,18). Preserve sharp prismatic form.
Create a flanged bushing with body OD 32, flange OD 48, through bore diameter 20, total length 26, and flange thickness 4.

Create one connected bushing in mm. Flange section: outer radius 24, inner radius 10, height 4 from z=0. Body section: outer radius 16, inner radius 10, height 22 from z=4 to z=26. Keep all features concentric on Z.
Create a U-channel block with outer size 100x40x35 mm, an internal cavity to form the channel, and two top holes diameter 7 at x=-35 and x=35.

Create one connected U-channel in mm. Outer block: 100x40x35 with bottom at z=0. Subtract an inner pocket 88x28x29 starting at z=6 to leave channel walls and base. Add two through holes diameter 7 on the top face at (-35,0) and (35,0). Keep one watertight component.
